nameMeanings.name: Sibilla
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Sybilla
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Sibella
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: Sibilla was born about 1410, in Church Stretton, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. She married Philip Done about 1431, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1518, in Worcester, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 109.

ja.lifeSummary: Sibillaは約1410年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアチャーチ ストレットオンで生まれた。約1431年にイギリスイギリスでPhilip Doneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1518年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウオルセスターで109歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sibilla(은)는 대략 1410년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 c후르치 스트레턴에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1431년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Philip Done(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1518년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 워스스터에서 109세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Sibilla родилась около 1410 г. в местности чурч стреттон, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. Она умерла в 1518 г. в местности ворсестир, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 109 лет.
